description: After adjustment, treatment groups are comparable on potential outcomes.
review_question: Are relevant confounders measured and adjusted?

description: Comparable treated and untreated units exist across covariate values.
Observed outcome corresponds to the defined treatment condition.
review_question: Does treatment mean the same thing across units?

description: Adjustment excludes variables caused by treatment.
review_question: Are mediators excluded from confounder adjustment?

description: Estimate applies only to bounded populations and settings.
review_question: Where should this estimate not be applied?
